title: [Brayern Isle, Fort Brayern]
description: Silver-striated white stone bricks line the floor of this fortress.  Above, a wide leather tarp pulled tight with thick ropes protects from harsh weather.  Ingress is granted via a metal portcullis built into the blue-green wooden fortress walls, which are hung with weathered violet-hued banners and lanterns.  The area's centerpiece is a small pool surrounding a blazing bonfire built on a raised white stone platform.  Some plush pillows surround both.  Wide white stone stairs with a prominent sign adjacent lead up and onward.
paths: Obvious exits: northeast, east, west, northwest
